title: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Scrapbook
content:
{{Top|rwm|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith}} {{Book |not_appearance=1 |image=[[File:Revenge_of_the_Sith_Scrapbook.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Scrapbook'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Random House]] |early release= |release date=[[April 2]], [[2005]]{{Amazon|url=/Revenge-Sith-Scrapbook-Star-Wars/dp/0375826114|text=Revenge of the Sith Scrapbook (Star Wars)|archivedate=20160528170422}} |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=48 |isbn=0375826114 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline= |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Scrapbook''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] children's reference book that serves as the "Ultimate Insider's Guide" to the [[prequel trilogy]] film {{Film|III}}. It was written by [[Ryder Windham]] and published by [[Random House]] on [[April 2]], [[2005]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''Go behind the scenes of the movie we've all been waiting for!''
''This scrapbook is your guide to Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith.''
''Discover incredible facts about the characters, aliens, planets, droids, weapons, and ships—including all the newest additions to the Star Wars galaxy.''
''See over 100 action-packed photos of the spectacular film where Anakin Skywalker dies—and Darth Vader is born.'' ==Continuity== The book makes reference to other ''[[Star Wars]]'' product lines, including the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' multimedia project and ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''. The book also includes the corvette as the ''[[Tantive IV/Legends|Tantive IV]]'', not the [[Sundered Heart/Legends|''Sundered Heart'']]. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star
